comment: Default-FAIL verification contract for T-002 (medium, acceptance-first). Populated after the quality gate reran tests/loop-driver.tests.sh/.ps1 (bash 22/22, pwsh 15/15 with a named, self-healing SKIP for the missing upstream spec-review-precheck.ps1) and the epic-159-pillar-a regression set (4 loop suites + template-validator-parity + crlf-parity + constant-parity + guard-ps1-ascii + validate-repository, all green). Shell stack waives the three compile-oriented checks (lint/typecheck/build); this task ships only a new sourced shell/PowerShell driver library and its smoke suite, no compiled toolchain.

checks.waiver_reason: No lint tool configured for this repository's shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files (stack: shell); bash -n and pwsh parse validity are exercised implicitly by every green run recorded in focused-tests.log.
No static type-check command is configured for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files.

The smoke suite drives spec-review rounds 1->3 through the REAL precheck and REAL validate-review-context-set.sh scripts against isolated mktemp fixtures; no separate service-integration surface exists beyond what unit/acceptance already exercise.
No compile/build toolchain for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files.
No runnable UI/service; this task adds only test-infrastructure (a sourced driver library plus its smoke suite), fully covered by the focused and regression logs.
No baseline-behavior.md; this is not a refactor/bugfix task (differential-test-policy.md does not apply).
No user-facing UI surface; this task adds only tests/lib/loop-driver.{sh,ps1} and tests/loop-driver.tests.{sh,ps1}.
ds_profile: none; no design-system/ directory exists in this repository.
